# HeavensLive — Divinely Underwritten Commerce
> AI-friendly site map for LLM crawlers. Discover our marketplace, wallet, and developer tools.

## Core Pages
- [Landing](heavenslive.com): Full platform overview, prayer audio, exchange rates
- [Shop](heavenslive.com/shop): Global marketplace — browse, buy, sell
- [Credon](heavenslive.com/credon): Digital wallet with borderless banking
- [API Docs](heavenslive.com/api-docs): Developer reference for all endpoints

## Key Features
- **17 languages** supported across all pages
- **100+ currencies** with live exchange rates
- **Free to join** — browse, list, and trade at no cost
- **Pro Plan ($9/mo)**: Featured listings, analytics, bulk import
- **Business Plan ($29/mo)**: Priority support, advanced features
- **Guest checkout** — no account needed to browse or buy
- **AI Listing Assistant** — generate complete listings from plain descriptions
- **AI Support Chat** — 24/7 assistance in any language
- **Affiliate Program** — earn commissions on referrals
- **PowerSync** — offline-first data with local SQLite

## Native Apps
- [Download](heavenslive.com/shop/download): Linux, Windows, macOS, Android, iOS

## For Developers
- [API Reference](heavenslive.com/api-reference): Complete endpoint documentation
- [Sitemap](heavenslive.com/sitemap.xml): Full site index for crawlers

## Content Mirrors
- [Shop Overview](heavenslive.com/shop.md): Markdown mirror of marketplace content
- [Credon Overview](heavenslive.com/credon.md): Markdown mirror of wallet content
- [Full API Docs](heavenslive.com/api-docs.md): Markdown mirror of API documentation
